MINORIS-GRIP_POWER.title: Grip
MINORIS-GRIP_POWER.description: When a player plays an Attack, this creature loses HP equal to [blue]{Amount}[/blue].

MINORIS-TOTH_SLATE_XIII_POWER.title: Thoth Slate - XIII
MINORIS-TOTH_SLATE_XIII_POWER.descriptio: At the end of your turn, trigger the following effect [blue]{Amount}[/blue] time(s): Gain 5 Block; Deal 5 damage to a random enemy; Gain 1 Energy; Heal 2 HP; You may choose a card in your hand to Exhaust; Gain 1 Strength; Draw 1 card and it gains Retain this combat; Gain 1 Dexterity; Gain 4 Vigor; Gain 1 Artifact.
